caption: A man in a dark suit jacket and light-colored shirt speaks and gestures with his right hand toward another man seated next to him. This second man wears a grey suit jacket and a light-colored tie, and he is focused on a silver laptop open on the table in front of him. They are seated in front of a light-colored backdrop featuring blue logos and the text "#BigData" and "#BigDataSV". Below them, a blue on-screen graphic reads "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015", with smaller text below specifying "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room" and "San Jose, CA". To the left of this text is an "NFO-OBJECTS" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man on the left continues to talk and move his hand, while the man on the right remains stationary, looking down at his laptop screen.
